/usr/bin/clang++ CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_tests.dir/unit/test_elf_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_tests.dir/unit/test_disassembler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_tests.dir/unit/test_graph_algorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_tests.dir/unit/test_json_dot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_tests.dir/unit/test_heuristics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_tests.dir/integration/test_integration_analysis.cpp.o -o binaryatlas_tests  ../libbinaryatlas_core.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a ../_deps/capstone-build/libcapstone.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
